description:
You are acting as a platform engineer reviewing a small set of in-house Kubernetes
    manifests that were supplied to you by an external vendor.  
    All three files are currently stored under  

        /home/user/k8s/manifests/

    and have the following common problems:

    • They are encoded in ISO-8859-1 (a.k.a. Latin-1).  
    • They still use DOS/Windows line-endings (CRLF).  
    • One of the manifests (the Deployment) still carries the deprecated  
      apiVersion “extensions/v1beta1” and therefore also lacks the mandatory
      “spec.selector” block that goes with “apps/v1”.

    Your task:

    1. Create a **new directory** called  

           /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8

       and place every converted manifest there.  
       Do NOT overwrite the originals.

    2. Convert every file in /home/user/k8s/manifests/ from ISO-8859-1 w/CRLF
       to **UTF-8 with Unix line-feeds only (LF)**.

    3. While converting, perform the following **content fix-ups**:  
       a. For the Deployment manifest only, change  

              apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1  

          to  

              apiVersion: apps/v1  

          and insert the mandatory selector so that the resulting section is
          exactly:

              spec:
                replicas: 2          # (preserve the original replica count)
                selector:
                  matchLabels:
                    app: my-app
                template:
                  metadata:
                    labels:
                      app: my-app
                  spec:
                    ...

          All indentation must be exactly two spaces per YAML level.  
       b. The Service and Ingress manifests require no field changes—
          just the encoding and EOL fixes.

    4. Create a plain-text log file called  

           /home/user/k8s/conversion.log

       that reports, **one line per processed file**, what you have done.  
       The format of each log line MUST be:

           <filename>:<encoding_before>-><encoding_after>:<eol_before>-><eol_after>:<status>

       The agent must use the following rigid tokens (case-sensitive):

       • encoding_before: “ISO-8859-1”  
       • encoding_after : “UTF-8”  
       • eol_before     : “CRLF”  
       • eol_after      : “LF”  
       • status         : 
            “UPDATED”   – when a semantic change was applied to the file  
            “UNCHANGED” – when only encoding/EOL were fixed

       Example for the Deployment (which needed the apiVersion + selector fix):
           deployment.yaml:ISO-8859-1->UTF-8:CRLF->LF:UPDATED

       The log lines must appear in lexicographic order by filename
       (deployment.yaml, ingress.yaml, service.yaml).

    5. After completion you should be able to run the following commands
       without error:

           kubectl apply -f /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/deployment.yaml
           kubectl apply -f /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/service.yaml
           kubectl apply -f /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/ingress.yaml

       (The cluster is not actually present in the testing container,
       but the manifests must be syntactically valid for these commands to
       succeed were a cluster available.)

    Evaluation criteria:
    • Presence of the directory /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8  
    • All three files inside it must be byte-for-byte UTF-8 with LF endings.  
    • The Deployment manifest must have apiVersion “apps/v1” and the correct
      selector block, indentation and field order.  
    • The Service and Ingress manifests must be identical to their originals
      apart from encoding/EOL.  
    • /home/user/k8s/conversion.log must exist and follow the exact,
      single-line, colon-delimited format described above.
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts:

    1. Directory structure
       /home/user/k8s/
                       └── manifests/
                               ├── deployment.yaml
                               ├── service.yaml
                               └── ingress.yaml

    2. File contents (all encoded ISO-8859-1, CRLF line endings):

       /home/user/k8s/manifests/deployment.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1\r\n
       kind: Deployment\r\n
       metadata:\r\n
         name: my-app\r\n
       spec:\r\n
         replicas: 2\r\n
         template:\r\n
           metadata:\r\n
             labels:\r\n
               app: my-app\r\n
           spec:\r\n
             containers:\r\n
             - name: my-app\r\n
               image: nginx:1.19\r\n

       /home/user/k8s/manifests/service.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: v1\r\n
       kind: Service\r\n
       metadata:\r\n
         name: my-app-service\r\n
       spec:\r\n
         selector:\r\n
           app: my-app\r\n
         ports:\r\n
           - port: 80\r\n
             targetPort: 80\r\n

       /home/user/k8s/manifests/ingress.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1\r\n
       kind: Ingress\r\n
       metadata:\r\n
         name: my-app-ingress\r\n
       spec:\r\n
         rules:\r\n
           - host: myapp.example.com\r\n
             http:\r\n
               paths:\r\n
                 - path: /\r\n
                   pathType: Prefix\r\n
                   backend:\r\n
                     service:\r\n
                       name: my-app-service\r\n
                       port:\r\n
                         number: 80\r\n

    3. Expected final state:

       a. Directory /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8 exists.

       b. Converted files (UTF-8, LF):

       /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/deployment.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: apps/v1\n
       kind: Deployment\n
       metadata:\n
         name: my-app\n
       spec:\n
         replicas: 2\n
         selector:\n
           matchLabels:\n
             app: my-app\n
         template:\n
           metadata:\n
             labels:\n
               app: my-app\n
           spec:\n
             containers:\n
             - name: my-app\n
               image: nginx:1.19\n

       /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/service.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: v1\n
       kind: Service\n
       metadata:\n
         name: my-app-service\n
       spec:\n
         selector:\n
           app: my-app\n
         ports:\n
           - port: 80\n
             targetPort: 80\n

       /home/user/k8s/manifests_utf8/ingress.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1\n
       kind: Ingress\n
       metadata:\n
         name: my-app-ingress\n
       spec:\n
         rules:\n
           - host: myapp.example.com\n
             http:\n
               paths:\n
                 - path: /\n
                   pathType: Prefix\n
                   backend:\n
                     service:\n
                       name: my-app-service\n
                       port:\n
                         number: 80\n

       c. Log file content (UTF-8, LF):

       /home/user/k8s/conversion.log
       ------------------------------------------------
       deployment.yaml:ISO-8859-1->UTF-8:CRLF->LF:UPDATED\n
       ingress.yaml:ISO-8859-1->UTF-8:CRLF->LF:UNCHANGED\n
       service.yaml:ISO-8859-1->UTF-8:CRLF->LF:UNCHANGED\n
